title: Make Your First Beat
description: Learn the basics by creating a simple drum pattern with a kick, snare, and hi-hat.

steps.title: Select Drum Track 1
steps.instruction: Press the Drum 1 button to select the kick drum track.
steps.tip: The button will light up when selected.

steps.title: Enter Step Mode
steps.instruction: The 32 pads now represent the steps in your pattern. Empty steps are dim, and steps with notes are lit.

steps.title: Program the Kick
steps.instruction: Tap pads 1, 5, 9, and 13 to create a four-on-the-floor kick pattern.
steps.tip: The pads will light up when you add a step.

steps.title: Press Play
steps.instruction: Press the Play button to hear your kick pattern loop.

steps.title: Select Drum Track 2
steps.instruction: Press the Drum 2 button to switch to the snare track.
steps.tip: Your kick pattern keeps playing while you switch tracks.

steps.title: Program the Snare
steps.instruction: Tap pads 5 and 13 to add snare on beats 2 and 4.

steps.title: Select Drum Track 3
steps.instruction: Press the Drum 3 button to switch to the hi-hat track.

steps.title: Program the Hi-Hat
steps.instruction: Tap every other pad (1, 3, 5, 7...) to create eighth-note hi-hats.
steps.tip: You can hold Clear and tap any step to remove it if you make a mistake.

outcomes: A basic drum pattern with kick, snare, and hi-hats
Understanding of how to select tracks and program steps
Ability to use the play and clear functions
